title: Materiality finding body (v1)
description: Input port copy (matches the upstream chip's `finding` output port by ref @1). Describes the `body` of the §8.2 materiality finding this chip consumes from the prior chip's response (delivered by the host as `activation['upstream']`). Cited source spans arrive on the sibling `upstream.evidence` field as taint-preserving quoted_span structures, kept structurally separate from the assessment (spec 8.2).

lineageKey.description: Passthrough of the originating §8.1 signal lineage key.

sourceUrl.description: Canonical source URL of the assessed publication.

reason.description: Present on an abstain body, e.g. 'insufficient-evidence'.

assessment.description: Chip/gateway-authored claim (finding only). May be a taint-marked value when derived from hostile model output.
